---
title: "Assingment 7 - AI Lab - April 9th, 2026"
subtitile: "Information Management"
format: 
  html:
     code-fold: true
     code-summary: "Show the Code"
---

# AI Lab 1

## Lab/R/Shiny/1

::: big-iframe
<iframe src="https://martinez2k18.shinyapps.io/EPPS6354-A7-Shine1/">

</iframe>
:::

## Lab/R/Shiny/2

::: big-iframe
<iframe src="https://martinez2k18.shinyapps.io/EPPS6354-A7-Shine2/">

</iframe>
:::
